Expert Sharpening

Our Story

Proudly Serving Texas Since 2003

The Knife Guys is your go-to destination for premium knives, swords, and self-defense supplies in the Texas Panhandle. Whether you are a home chef looking for the perfect kitchen knife, a collector searching for rare and antique blades, or someone who values personal safety, we have you covered. Our knowledgeable staff is passionate about helping you find exactly what you need.

What We Carry

Our Product Categories

Kitchen Knives

Chef knives, paring knives, steak knives, and complete sets from top brands. The foundation of every great kitchen.

Hunting Knives

Fixed blade, folding, and skinning knives built for the outdoors. Durable, reliable, and ready for the field.

Collectible Knives

Rare finds, limited editions, and antique pieces for the serious collector. Pieces you will not find anywhere else.

Swords

Hanger swords, hook swords, decorative swords, and battle swords. Historical significance meets craftsmanship.

Self-Defense

Pepper spray, flashlights, stun guns, and self-defense keychains. Peace of mind when it matters most.

Custom Engraving

Make it personal. Professional engraving services for knives, tools, and gifts. Available at both store locations.
